metadata.description: Distribution marketplace for the orchestrator-loop plugin.

plugins.name: orchestrator-loop
plugins.description: Turn Claude into a disciplined engineering lead: plans the work, writes the spec, hands the coding to an executor, then independently QAs the result. Enforces engineering guardrails and a skeptical, evidence-first mindset — distrust too-good results, find the root cause, stay honest. App-agnostic: bring your own project profile and tools.
